item.title: Can creditors restart collections after a debt relief program ends?
item.description: Finishing a debt relief program doesn't guarantee that creditors are gone for good. Here's what to know.

item.title: John Phelan out as Navy secretary in latest high-profile Trump admin. departure
item.description: Navy Secretary John Phelan is leaving his role effective immediately, chief Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell said​ Wednesday.

item.title: Justice Department eases restrictions on some marijuana products
item.description: The order places FDA-approved products containing marijuana and state-regulated medical marijuana products at a lower drug classification.

item.title: Cotton pushes bill to help critical infrastructure defend against drone threat
item.description: Cotton says current law leaves U.S. power grids, wastewater plants, and other high-risk sites exposed to emerging drone threats.

item.title: Iran touts video of ship seizures as Trump keeps quiet on his next move
item.description: Iran releases video showing commandos seizing ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump remains largely silent on his next move in the war.
